title: ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. bungeana
intro: Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. bungeana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mint or a wild marjoram. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. bungeana include relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, it is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
